mapper.select: SELECT c.*, cl.name AS class_name, cr.name AS classroom_name, s.name AS subject_name, u.username AS teacher_name, cr.row_count AS row_count, cr.col_count AS col_count FROM sys_course c LEFT JOIN sys_class cl ON c.class_id = cl.id LEFT JOIN sys_classroom cr ON c.classroom_id = cr.id LEFT JOIN sys_subject s ON c.subject_id = s.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.teacher_id = u.id

SELECT c.*, cl.name AS class_name, cr.name AS classroom_name, s.name AS subject_name, u.username AS teacher_name, cr.row_count AS row_count, cr.col_count AS col_count FROM sys_course c LEFT JOIN sys_class cl ON c.class_id = cl.id LEFT JOIN sys_classroom cr ON c.classroom_id = cr.id LEFT JOIN sys_subject s ON c.subject_id = s.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.teacher_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{id}

SELECT c.*, cl.name AS class_name, cr.name AS classroom_name, s.name AS subject_name, u.username AS teacher_name, cr.row_count AS row_count, cr.col_count AS col_count FROM sys_course c LEFT JOIN sys_class cl ON c.class_id = cl.id LEFT JOIN sys_classroom cr ON c.classroom_id = cr.id LEFT JOIN sys_subject s ON c.subject_id = s.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.teacher_id = u.id WHERE c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND c.weekday = #{weekday}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_course (name, class_id, classroom_id, subject_id, teacher_id, weekday, start_time, end_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{classId}, #{classroomId}, #{subjectId}, #{teacherId}, #{weekday}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.name, c.class_id, cl.name AS class_name, c.classroom_id, cr.name AS classroom_name, c.subject_id, s.name AS subject_name, c.teacher_id, u.username AS teacher_name, c.weekday, c.start_time, c.end_time, cr.row_count AS row_count, cr.col_count AS col_count FROM sys_course c LEFT JOIN sys_class cl ON c.class_id = cl.id LEFT JOIN sys_classroom cr ON c.classroom_id = cr.id LEFT JOIN sys_subject s ON c.subject_id = s.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.teacher_id = u.id WHERE c.class_id = #{classId}

SELECT c.id, c.name, c.class_id, cl.name AS class_name, c.classroom_id, cr.name AS classroom_name, c.subject_id, s.name AS subject_name, c.teacher_id, u.username AS teacher_name, c.weekday, c.start_time, c.end_time, cr.row_count AS row_count, cr.col_count AS col_count FROM sys_course c LEFT JOIN sys_class cl ON c.class_id = cl.id LEFT JOIN sys_classroom cr ON c.classroom_id = cr.id LEFT JOIN sys_subject s ON c.subject_id = s.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.teacher_id = u.id WHERE c.teacher_id = #{teacherId}
